news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

overview.description: The JPMorgan International Bond Opportunities Fund (JPIB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund provides total return through the active management of a broad based, broad maturity bond portfolio reaching sectors in both developed and emerging markets around the world outside of the US. JPIB was launched on Apr 3, 2017 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...

data.text: These ETFs are a one-stop shop for global diversification.
